name: Mypoint
description_short: MyPoint Credit Union is a San Diego-based credit union offering checking, savings, certificates, loans, and credit cards with competitive rates and local branch access.
description_long:
MyPoint Credit Union is a community-focused financial institution based in San Diego, California, serving the local area with multiple branch locations including a Carlsbad branch. As a federally insured credit union, MyPoint operates under NCUA supervision with deposits insured up to $250,000 per individual depositor through the National Credit Union Share Insurance Fund (NCUSIF). The institution positions itself as a member-owned alternative to traditional banks with an emphasis on personalized service and local decision-making.

MyPoint offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including high-yield checking accounts (up to 3.25% APY), savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs and IRAs with 3.00% APY on 18-month terms), auto loans (rates as low as 5.34% APR), home equity lines of credit, solar and green living loans (7.49% APR), credit cards including the MyPoint Perks Visa with introductory 2.99% APR, and mobile banking with check deposit capabilities. The credit union also advertises competitive rates across product categories and offers online banking, business online banking, and loan payment portals for member convenience.

MyPoint differentiates itself through its local San Diego community presence, emphasis on member service quality, and specialized offerings like solar loans aligned with the region's green living interests. The website highlights staff responsiveness and personalized attention, with member testimonials praising specific loan officers and branch staff. The institution promotes financial wellness through educational content on financial health checkups, security reminders, and overdraft avoidance tips, positioning itself as a trusted local alternative to national banks.

As a credit union, MyPoint operates under cooperative membership principles with lower operating costs that theoretically translate to competitive rates. However, membership eligibility may be restricted (the website mentions becoming a member but details are in a popup), and as a regional institution with limited branch locations, it serves primarily San Diego County residents. The specific membership eligibility criteria and any geographic restrictions are not fully transparent on the public-facing website.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) and IRA CDs (3.00% APY on 18-month terms)
Solar and green living loans (7.49% APR)
MyPoint Perks Visa credit card (2.99% introductory APR, no balance transfer fee)
Mobile banking with mobile check deposit and biometric security
Online banking and business online banking portals
Financial wellness education and checkup tools
pros: Federal NCUA insurance protection up to $250,000 per depositor
High-yield checking account offering up to 3.25% APY
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.34% APR
Specialized solar and green living loans at 7.49% APR
Mobile banking with biometric security and mobile check deposit
Multiple physical branch locations in San Diego area including Carlsbad
Strong member testimonials highlighting responsive, personalized staff service
cons: Membership eligibility criteria not clearly disclosed on website (may have geographic or employment restrictions typical of credit unions)
Limited branch network compared to national banks—San Diego region only
Introductory credit card rate of 2.99% APR implies higher ongoing rates after promotional period
No mention of ATM network access or out-of-network ATM fee reimbursement
Website does not disclose membership fees, minimum balance requirements, or full product fee schedules
best_for: San Diego County residents seeking local, community-focused banking with personalized service
Auto buyers looking for competitive rates below 5.5% APR without national bank overhead
Homeowners interested in solar loans or green living financing options
Savers prioritizing high-yield checking and CD rates over large national bank convenience
diagnosis: MyPoint Credit Union is best for San Diego-area residents who prioritize local relationship banking, competitive rates, and specialized products like solar loans, and who value credit union structure over national bank convenience. The main caveat is that membership eligibility may be restricted by geography or other criteria (typical for credit unions but not fully transparent here), and the limited branch network makes it unsuitable for those needing broad geographic access.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Mypoint — Credit Union in San Diego, CA | CreditDoc
meta_description: Mypoint — NCUA-insured credit union in San Diego, CA. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
